compositional_truth_check.details: The biome is currently devoid of any viable plant life. The registry identifies P1, P2, P3, and P4, but the visual evidence confirms only empty soil and debris.

plant_audit.P1: Empty yellow pot; soil appears undisturbed but barren.
plant_audit.P2: Empty black pot; no signs of mint foliage.
plant_audit.P3: Empty black pot; white rabbit anchor is missing or obscured by debris.
plant_audit.P4: Empty black pot; no silver guest specimen present.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, moist, and appears to have been recently disturbed or cleared.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, fragmented material (likely eggshell shards) in the foreground pot.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no organic matter or leaf litter detected outside the pots.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_current: The sequence shows a consistent state of emptiness. There is no evidence of growth, decay, or active plant presence across the 5-day window. The environment is static.

visual_health_inference.conclusion: Total biological failure. The pots are currently functioning as soil containers only, with no active botanical specimens to monitor.
visual_health_inference.recommendation: Re-seed or re-introduce specimens; current biome is non-functional.

anomalies: Presence of white, calcified fragments (eggshells) in the soil, likely an attempt at soil amendment or pest deterrence.
Complete absence of the P3 scale anchor (white rabbit).
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a completely barren biome. Across the entire chronological stack, there is no evidence of the registered plants (P1-P4). The pots contain only dark, damp soil and some unidentified white fragments. The environment appears to be in a state of total systemic loss, with no signs of life or recent botanical activity.
